name: Middle Fork Salmon — Boundary Creek to Cache Bar
hazards: Remote wilderness, no cell service, no road access between put-in and take-out
Continuous Class III–IV at standard flows; rated higher at high water
points_of_interest: Velvet Falls (II–IV): first major drop, ~5 mi in
Pistol Creek (III–IV): tight S-turn between cliff walls
Loon Creek Hot Spring + Sunflower Hot Springs along the run
usgs_site_name: MF Salmon River at MF Lodge nr Yellow Pine, ID (Station 13309220)
